children.label: A
children.text: progress achieved in implementing the levee safety initiative;

children.label: B
children.text: State, regional, and tribal participation in the levee safety initiative;

children.label: i
children.text: identifying and evaluating opportunities to coordinate public safety, floodplain management, and environmental protection activities relating to levees; and

children.label: ii
children.text: evaluating opportunities to coordinate environmental permitting processes for operation and maintenance activities at existing levee projects in compliance with all applicable laws; and

children.label: D
children.text: any recommendations for legislation and other congressional actions necessary to ensure national levee safety.

children.heading: Inclusion
children.label: 2 Inclusion
children.text: Each report under paragraph (1) shall include a report of the committee that describes the independent recommendations of the committee for the implementation of the levee safety initiative.

children.heading: National dam and levee safety program
children.label: b National dam and levee safety program
children.text: Not later than 3 years after , to the maximum extent practicable, the Secretary and the Administrator, in coordination with the committee, shall submit to Congress and make publicly available a report that includes recommendations regarding the advisability and feasibility of, and potential approaches for, establishing a joint national dam and levee safety program.June 10, 2014

children.heading: Alignment of Federal programs relating to levees
children.label: c Alignment of Federal programs relating to levees

children.text: to promote shared responsibility for levee safety;
to encourage the development of strong State, regional, and tribal levee safety programs;
to better align the levee safety initiative with other Federal flood risk management programs; and
to promote increased levee safety through other Federal programs providing assistance to State, regional, tribal, and local governments.

children.heading: Liability for certain levee engineering projects
children.label: d Liability for certain levee engineering projects

children.text: levee owners from obtaining needed levee engineering services; or
development and implementation of a State, regional, or tribal levee safety program.
